title: Divine Departure at Elbaf
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Shanks, Unknown person #4, Killer, Atlas, York, Unknown person #5 as Shanks crushes Kid near Elbaf, showing how violently the race for the One Piece has accelerated.
scene: Shanks crushes Kid near Elbaf, showing how violently the race for the One Piece has accelerated.

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: War-land Elbaf, New World

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are the kid pirates splashing about here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Have you come for our beloved chief?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I won't RIGHT myself again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not going to see him, so just hop off!

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.text: Trust the captain to get tongue tied!

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.text: Captain of the puddle pirates "padded-toe Gerotini*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He speaks the TOO-TH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: For!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: FUGAR MOGO--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GRAMS, YOUR DENTURES!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Head of the Social Club Pirates "grave Tooth FUGAR"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: 'You Icky pleb! I hate 'your guts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wow! You're so bold, Princess!)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Princess of bourgeois Pirates "Panicky Pururu"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell?! Are these jokes really with red hair?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: "THEY'VE GOT SOME BIG NAMES WITH THEM,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is supposed to be the new world, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: DON'T LOWER YOUR GUARD.

dialogue.speaker: Atlas
dialogue.text: Don't worry, I never pull my punches!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: Tell them to retreat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I am not sure if

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What are you saying, chief?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't let them lay a finger on you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I appreciate the sentiment, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I want all ships to fall back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're already heading off, chief?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We only just met up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was just stopping by, but I lost track of time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....and this big shot showed up, so now I've gotta deal with him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: get those ships to move and open a path.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The real reason you have to deal with him is 'cause the fleet's notoriously WEAK.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A bunch of us wouldn't have lived this long if it weren't for your flag's protection!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only enemy you need to worry about is father time, Granny Ori.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho! well aren't you cheeky?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: don't sweat it, chief. We can handle this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You shouldn't underestimate the growth of these youngsters.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: His head's worth three billion, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, has he had enough time to heal since he was on wano?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He looks lively enough, and he seems up for a fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Guess it's fine then...

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Any news on Blackbeard?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Nope, last we heard he left pirate island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Catch

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was sure he was going to show his face in wano...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got some info on Captain Kid though.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So he's from the South Blue...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He sure did a lot of rampaging to make it this far.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How many ships are there now?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: NINE! AND THERE'S PLENTY OF FACES I RECOGNIZE FROM THE BOUNTY POSTERS ON THEM...
